creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
The programers of the file utility fixed the bug another way on
2/18/2014.  They patched src/softmagic.c:

- save current locale
- set locale to C
- run the regcomp
- restore the saved locale

The patch can be obtained from:

http://bugs.gw.com/view.php?id=292

Most likely the fix will be included in file >5.17.

-- 
DISCLAIMER:

No electrons were maimed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
